description: Product description Alien Eye Boppers on Headband – Space Fancy Dress Sci-Fi Costume Accessory Get ready to turn heads with these Alien Eye Boppers on Headband, a fun and quirky accessory that’s perfect for any space, sci-fi, or monster-themed costume. Featuring spring-mounted alien eyes that bounce as you move, this playful headband instantly transforms you into a wacky extraterrestrial creature. Lightweight, comfortable, and easy to wear, it’s ideal for fancy dress parties, festivals, school events, cosplay, or just adding some out-of-this-world fun to your outfit. Whether you’re aiming for cute, funny, or spooky, these alien eye boppers are the perfect finishing touch. 👽 Features: Alien eye boppers on springy antenna headband Eyes jiggle and bounce with movement for a fun effect Comfortable and lightweight for long wear Great for sci-fi, space, or monster fancy dress looks One size fits most adult Safety Warning Does Not Apply
